net.dapete.exceptional.function.ExLongConsumer

Packages that use ExLongConsumer
Package
Description
net.dapete.exceptional.stream
This package provides utilities for handling checked exceptions in Streams.

  • Uses of ExLongConsumer in net.dapete.exceptional.stream

    Methods in net.dapete.exceptional.stream with parameters of type ExLongConsumer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ExLongMapMultiConsumer.accept(long value, ExLongConsumer<E> ic)
    Replaces the given value with zero or more values by feeding the mapped values to the ic consumer.
    void
    ExLongStream.exForEach(ExLongConsumer<?> action)
    Equivalent of LongStream.forEach(LongConsumer).

    Equivalent of LongStream.forEachOrdered(LongConsumer).
